benefits.description: Hunger suppression present but subtle; could take or leave food. Appetite more controlled and feeling full off smaller amounts of food.

side_effects.description: Eating a pop tart made his stomach kind of uneasy

protocol_notes: Started at 1mg, plans to increase by 0.5mg every two weeks until reaching 2.5mg. Taking it slowly to minimize side effects. Also documenting journey with start photos. Wife also started simultaneously at 0.5mg.
